title: centaurium centaurium
intro: Centaurium centaurium, also known as common centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurium centaurium include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, while also supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Centaurium centaurium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
